name: Sawai Group Holdings Co., Ltd.
summary: Sawai Group Holdings Co., Ltd., together with subsidiaries, manufactures, sells, imports, and exports pharmaceutical products in Japan and the United States. The company offers drugs in various formulations, including tablets, oral dispersing tablets, capsules, granules, injections, tapes, ophthalmic/nasal solutions, syrups, etc. in the therapeutic areas of cardiovascular, gastro-intestinal, blood/body fluid, other metabolic, antibiotics, central nervous system, antiallergics, chemotherapeutics, vitamins, anti-cancer, etc. It serves hospitals, general practitioners, and dispensing pharmacies. Sawai Group Holdings Co., Ltd. was founded in 1929 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
